ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leds" (
  "led_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LED */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the LED (e.g., RED, GREEN, BLUE) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the LED (ON/OFF) */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the LED (0-100%) */,
  "max_intensity" REAL /* Maximum intensity the LED can reach (0-100%) */,
  "min_intensity" REAL /* Minimum intensity the LED can reach (0-100%) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the LED was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the LED's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("led_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_combinations" (
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color combination */,
  "red_led_id" INTEGER /* ID of the red LED in the combination */,
  "green_led_id" INTEGER /* ID of the green LED in the combination */,
  "blue_led_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blue LED in the combination */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value representing the combination (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the combination was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the combination was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_combinations_blue_led_id FOREIGN KEY ("blue_led_id") REFERENCES leds ("led_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_combinations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_combinations_green_led_id FOREIGN KEY ("green_led_id") REFERENCES leds ("led_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_combinations_red_led_id FOREIGN KEY ("red_led_id") REFERENCES leds ("led_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resultant_colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resultant color */,
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color combination that produces the resultant color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the resultant color (e.g., RED, GREEN, BLUE, YELLOW, etc.) */,
  "hue" REAL /* Hue of the resultant color (0-360°) */,
  "saturation" REAL /* Saturation of the resultant color (0-100%) */,
  "brightness" REAL /* Brightness of the resultant color (0-100%) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resultant color was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resultant color information was last updated */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code of the resultant color (e.g., #FF0000 for red) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resultant_colors_combination_id FOREIGN KEY ("combination_id") REFERENCES color_combinations ("combination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the preference */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the preferred color */,
  "hue" REAL /* Hue of the preferred color (0-360°) */,
  "saturation" REAL /* Saturation of the preferred color (0-100%) */,
  "brightness" REAL /* Brightness of the preferred color (0-100%) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_suggestions" (
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color suggestion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the suggestion */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the suggested color */,
  "hue" REAL /* Hue of the suggested color (0-360°) */,
  "saturation" REAL /* Saturation of the suggested color (0-100%) */,
  "brightness" REAL /* Brightness of the suggested color (0-100%) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suggestion was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suggestion was last updated */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user accepted the suggestion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suggestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_suggestions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combination_leds" (
  "combination_led_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each combination-LED pair */,
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color combination */,
  "led_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LED in the combination */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the LED in the combination (0-100%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combination_led_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combination_leds_combination_id FOREIGN KEY ("combination_id") REFERENCES color_combinations ("combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combination_leds_led_id FOREIGN KEY ("led_id") REFERENCES leds ("led_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the accessed color */,
  "hue" REAL /* Hue of the accessed color (0-360°) */,
  "saturation" REAL /* Saturation of the accessed color (0-100%) */,
  "brightness" REAL /* Brightness of the accessed color (0-100%) */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., 'view', 'select', 'edit') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
